terms.Transport: The entry routing and protocol mapping layer (located in backend/api) handling REST routes.
terms.Domain: The core business logic layer containing pure calculations and workflows (located in core/src/domain).
terms.Core: The workspace encapsulating Mongoose schemas, services, database adapters, and queues (located in core/).
terms.Shared: Isomorphic isomorphic helper library containing common validation schemas and helpers (located in shared/).
terms.Gateway: Express routing gateways directing requests to core orchestrators.
terms.Repository Doctor: The programmatic command CLI tool executing quality checks.
terms.Governance Engine: The central validation compiler package repository-governance.
terms.Analyzer: A scanner collecting code statistics and payloads.
terms.Validator: A logic layer validating analyzer outputs against strict project configurations.
terms.Reporter: Output managers summarizing quality tests statuses.
